questionHtml: The frequency of the oscillator is reduced to 120 Hz. On the diagram, draw the standing wave that will be formed on the string.
markschemeHtml:
first harmonic mode drawn ✔

NOTE: Allow if only one curve drawn, either solid or dashed.
